rationale.completeness: Implements SSEResponse as StreamingResponse subclass with automatic event formatting, retry configuration, and proper media type. Exports both SSEResponse and sse helper. Client disconnect handling is implicit via StreamingResponse inheritance rather than explicit.
rationale.correctness: Implementation is sound with proper async/sync handling via _wrap_sse_content. The _is_async detection has edge cases but handles the main scenarios correctly. SSE formatting follows spec with CRLF line endings and proper multiline data handling.
rationale.style: Follows project conventions well - uses existing import patterns, consistent type hints, proper docstrings matching project style, and follows same testing patterns as other test files.
rationale.quality: Clean, well-organized code with good abstractions (helper functions for wrapping). Tests are comprehensive. Minor improvement would be reordering retry parameter in SSEResponse.__init__ to be alphabetically consistent.
